testcase.name: Complete Project Lifecycle E2E › complete lifecycle: stage → launch → execute → closeout

failure.message: complete-project-lifecycle.spec.ts:63:7 complete lifecycle: stage → launch → execute → closeout

testcase.failure:
[chromium] › complete-project-lifecycle.spec.ts:63:7 › Complete Project Lifecycle E2E › complete lifecycle: stage → launch → execute → closeout
Error: expect(locator).toBeVisible() failed
Locator: locator('[data-testid="stage-project-btn"]') Expected: visible Timeout: 5000ms Error: element(s) not found
Call log: - Expect "toBeVisible" with timeout 5000ms - waiting for locator('[data-testid="stage-project-btn"]')
71 | // Click "Stage Project" button 72 | const stageBtn = page.locator('[data-testid="stage-project-btn"]') > 73 | await expect(stageBtn).toBeVisible() | ^ 74 | await expect(stageBtn).toBeEnabled() 75 | await stageBtn.click() 76 | at F:\GiljoAI_MCP\frontend\tests\e2e\complete-project-lifecycle.spec.ts:73:28
